name: Sylus
description:
𝗰𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗴𝘆 | "do you really think I would let you get hurt?" | in which Sylus always has you accompany him to his meetings.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤ

I have this little belief that everyone has a "fatal flaw(s)" and whether you choose to accept them or not is how you choose the people in your company.

Absolutely no one is perfect but one of my friends who is great in pretty much every other way has been PISSING ME THE FUCK OFF 😭

Lord, I constantly find myself in situations where I'm unable to cut someone off due to other complications and it's gonna drive me crazy one day cause how are people this insane???

moving on,

If y'all were not already made aware, curious cat is being shut down (today I believe) so obviously I won't be able to receive messages from there. I made a tellonym but that site also sends bots to ask you questions and it makes so much clutter 😩

If anyone knows of a similar application lmk! I know tumblr exists but my notifications don't work there and it feels weird to make whole posts just to respond to something 😓

P.S. I'm tired of constantly bringing this up but just so everyone knows, I only do bots for a few characters (it's already on my rules but we know how that goes)! Here's the list:

Satoru Gojo (obviously)

Ryomen Sukuna (currently a little complicated due to the avatar rule)

Utahime Iori

Shoko Ieiri

Levi Ackerman

Osamu Dazai

Kaeya Alberich

Sylus (LND)

Zayne (LND)

Raphael (LND)

If they aren't on this list, I don't make bots for them! And for the love of god stop leaving requests in the review section, what the hell am I supposed to do/say if I don't like yours 😭??? I only take requests through the links down below.

anyways,

ENJOY!

Love,

Mama Down
